name.description: Name of the benchmark run, used for labeling results

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 formatted timestamp of when the benchmark was run

meta.description: Optional display-name mappings. Defined once per file, never repeated per measurement.

series.description: Maps each series_key to its display metadata.

groups.description: Maps each group_key to its display metadata.

measurements.description: List of benchmark measurements. Each measurement is identified by group_key (which graph) and series_key (which line).

series_key.description: Stable identifier for this series/line. Must not change once published.

group_key.description: Stable identifier that groups measurements into the same graph. Must not change once published.

duration.description: Measured duration in Go time.Duration syntax.

iterations.description: Number of iterations the benchmark performed (optional).

description.description: Optional free-text annotation shown in tooltips.
